invariant: The get_entity_context Read ability returns only user-authored context entries for the requested entity and preserves the legacy created_at descending order without merging sibling account context.
pass_fail_definition: PASS = output is byte-identical to the legacy entity_context_entries projection for dos287-target-example and excludes the adjacent account row. FAIL = foreign account notes appear, order changes, or source_asof/user provenance is missing.

fixture_design_notes.state_sql: Copies the DOS-287 bundle-1 reproduction seed pattern with parent, target, adjacent account, domains, stakeholders, and synthetic entity_context_entries. The adjacent account has a newer row that must not bleed into the target account read.
fixture_design_notes.provider_replay: Empty because DOS-218 is a pure Read ability and makes no provider calls.
fixture_design_notes.external_replay: Empty because DOS-218 is a pure Read ability and makes no external service calls.
fixture_design_notes.expected_output: The two target account context entries ordered by created_at DESC, matching the legacy command DTO shape.
fixture_design_notes.expected_provenance: Direct user source attribution for each returned row, direct subject attribution on every leaf, empty thread_ids, and no composed children.
